summary_one_line: A LangSys reqFeatureIndex field whose 16-bit value is not the sentinel 0xFFFF, so the false branch (real required-feature index) is taken.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A well-formed GSUB/GPOS LangSys record whose 16-bit reqFeatureIndex field holds a value other than 0xFFFF — the input must reach a parsed LangSys and supply a non-sentinel required-feature index so that the equality test reqFeatureIndex == 0xFFFFu fails and control returns reqFeatureIndex.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seeds carry structured table headers with GPOS/GSUB tags and offset/index fields (e.g. tag bytes 47 50 4f 53 'GPOS' / 47 53 55 42 'GSUB' at 0x0c-0x0f, structured 18/02/1f/08 offset runs), and the cmplog/vpc CMP buffer lets I2SRandReplace substitute the captured 0xFFFF operand into a 16-bit field that is then mutated to a non-0xFFFF reqFeatureIndex, reaching the false branch (W hits the line 11 True / 15 False and return reqFeatureIndex executes only for W).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser seeds are short and unstructured (6, 13, 27, 57 bytes) and never construct a valid LangSys record carrying a non-sentinel reqFeatureIndex; whenever they do reach the comparison the field reads as the default 0xFFFF, so they always take the true branch (L hits 72 True / 0 False) and the function returns NOT_FOUND_INDEX.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc intercept the integer comparison reqFeatureIndex == 0xFFFFu, record both operands into the CmpLogObserver buffer, and I2SRandReplace then writes the comparison constant into the matching input offset and havoc nudges it off the sentinel; naive and value_profile lack I2SRandReplace and cannot reliably plant a non-0xFFFF value in the reqFeatureIndex slot of a structurally valid record.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked branch is the false side of an equality test against the constant 0xFFFF on reqFeatureIndex.
The globally blocked side is the false branch, which returns the real reqFeatureIndex.
Both decisive pairs differ by the I2S technique only.
Winner seeds carry structured GPOS/GSUB table tags and offset fields.
Loser-blocking seeds are short and unstructured (e.g. 6 bytes).
evidence_trail.exact_quote: Seed 1 (id=003817559785f774, size=6 bytes, fuzzer=naive, trial=1, discovered_at=0s, mutation_op=ByteDecMutator,WordAddMutator):

evidence_trail.claim: At the blocker line the winner takes the false branch while the loser only ever takes the true branch.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 983  T=11 F=15  T=72 F=0  if (reqFeatureIndex == 0xFFFFu)  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which substitutes a captured CMP operand into matching input offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator, so it cannot perform the operand substitution.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5478 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed aa6f47881154f74f`; the 19-level ancestor chain contains 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 18 (ancestor e0a5b09f80625fb6), direct lower-bound evidence of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in the vpc winner lineage.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with the reqFeatureIndex==0xFFFF gate where cmplog/vpc resolve the false branch no faster than naive/value_profile (no I2S advantage), showing the divergence is not driven by I2S substitution of the comparison constant.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact input offset of the reqFeatureIndex field is not pinned by the byte diff (offsets 0x06-0x1b differ but none is uniquely identified as the 16-bit reqFeatureIndex slot), so the precise substitution site is inferred from structure rather than directly located.
